_comment: Declared RevenueCat baseline for the store_health_checker drift check. Fill 'offerings' and 'products' with the REAL RevenueCat offering ids / product (SKU) store-identifiers you expect to be live and purchasable; list 'trials' for products that must carry an intro/free-trial. EMPTY arrays => drift detection is SKIPPED (the checker does live purchasability + paywall checks only, and never raises a false drift alarm). Override path via env RC_BASELINE_PATH.
